title: Crumbly Irish Bread Crock-Pot Caramel Sauce Hangover Cure
description: A hearty Irish dish featuring crumbly bread, caramel sauce, and a gentle braise to help cure hangovers, perfect for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: 2 slices bread
ingredients.notes: Use any type of bread, but whole grain is recommended.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons corn syrup or honey (as sweetener)

instructions: Cut bread into bite-sized pieces and place them in a small, heat-safe container.
Melt the softened butter with cinnamon and salt/pepper mix on low heat, stirring frequently until fully melted. Pour this mixture over the bread pieces, gently tossing to coat evenly.
Cover the container tightly with foil or plastic wrap and place it in the oven for 45 minutes or until tender but still crumbly.

Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine sugar, corn syrup, water, and optional sweetener. Heat over medium-high heat until thickened like caramel sauce (carefully removing from heat when done to prevent scorching).
Gently spoon the hot caramel over the bread pieces, distributing evenly while hot.
Allow to cool before serving with a side of yogurt or berries for added nutrients.
